name: Frost
tagline: Takes you to a "different state of mind" (Kid Bloom)
notes: Showcases vanilla, amber, pink pepper, nutmeg, red rose and white rose with supreme elegance
description: Frost is a women's fragrance that showcases vanilla, amber, pink pepper, nutmeg, red rose and white rose with supreme elegance. Built on an 18% oil concentration, it takes you to a different state of mind. A premium, timeless fragrance from Ice Fragrances.

name: Glacier
tagline: Feels like "insomnia relief" during "after hours" (The Weeknd)
notes: Features grapefruit, elderwood, cedarwood, neroli, lavender and blood orange in an infinitely timeless manner
description: Glacier is a men's fragrance featuring grapefruit, elderwood, cedarwood, neroli, lavender and blood orange in an infinitely timeless manner. With an 18% oil concentration, it feels like insomnia relief during after hours. A premium, timeless fragrance from Ice Fragrances.

name: Hailstone
notes: Hallmarks jasmine, coriander, incense, cloves, tonka bean, red rose and clementine with a spice to the scent overall
description: Hailstone is a women's fragrance that hallmarks jasmine, coriander, incense, cloves, tonka bean, red rose and clementine, with a spice to the scent overall. At a 13% oil concentration, it smells like an absolute wildflower. A premium, timeless fragrance from Ice Fragrances.

name: Iceberg
notes: Highlights bergamot, eucalyptus, mint, pomelo and rosemary boldly without being overpowering
description: Iceberg is a men's fragrance that highlights bergamot, eucalyptus, mint, pomelo and rosemary boldly without being overpowering. With a 13% oil concentration, it makes the world embrace. A premium, timeless fragrance from Ice Fragrances.

name: Half-Sleeve Tees
tagline: We might never make these again
description: Limited cotton-poly half-sleeve shirts from Ice Fragrances, available in sizes L and XL. We might never make these again.

name: Nylon Dress Shirts
tagline: We might never make these again
description: Limited button-up collared nylon dress shirts from Ice Fragrances, available in sizes M, L and XL. We might never make these again.

name: Humidifier
notes: A water & oil based scented humidifier order comes with an oil base
description: A water- and oil-based scented humidifier from Ice Fragrances — every order comes with an oil base. Freshen your world.

name: Car Freshener's
tagline: Light, tangy, and cleanses your car with a spring-fresh scent
notes: 70 fresheners per order, plus 3 free ones with every order
description: Light, tangy car fresheners that cleanse your car with a spring-fresh scent. Each order from Ice Fragrances includes 70 fresheners, plus 3 free ones with every order.
